question: Quels fichiers standard un repo doit-il contenir et quoi mettre dans chacun ?

principles.text: 4 fichiers obligatoires avec scopes distincts (single source of truth) : (1) README.md = landing page (description, stack, prerequis, install, commandes, quick-start). (2) CONTRIBUTING.md = process de contribution (workflow PR, branches, commits, setup dev, tests requis). (3) CONVENTIONS.md = regles de code (nommage, patterns, architecture, regles non automatisables). (4) LICENSE. Recommandes : CHANGELOG.md (par version, categories Added/Changed/Fixed), SECURITY.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md. CLAUDE.md = pointeurs uniquement vers les fichiers canoniques + contraintes AI-specifiques, jamais de duplication. Regle cardinale : chaque info existe dans un seul fichier, les autres font des liens. CONTRIBUTING ≠ CONVENTIONS : process (comment contribuer, lu une fois) ≠ reference (regles de code, consulte en continu).

sources.name: GitHub Docs — Community health files
sources.quote: README, CONTRIBUTING, LICENSE, CODE_OF_CONDUCT, SECURITY recommended for healthy contributions

sources.name: Google SWE Book Ch.10 — Documentation
sources.quote: Style guides are standalone canonical documents, referenced from CONTRIBUTING but never inlined

sources.name: InnerSource Commons — Standard Base Documentation
sources.quote: Do not copy organizational coding standards into the repo — link to them. CONTRIBUTING = how to participate, CONVENTIONS = how to write code

sources.name: Open Source Guides (opensource.guide)
sources.quote: Lower the barrier to first contribution with clear CONTRIBUTING.md

sources.name: Linux Foundation CII Best Practices Badge
sources.quote: README with description/install/build, CONTRIBUTING, LICENSE, CHANGELOG required for passing

sources.name: Keep a Changelog
sources.quote: Categories: Added, Changed, Deprecated, Removed, Fixed, Security. Human-curated, not git log dumps

sources.name: Anthropic — CLAUDE.md documentation
sources.quote: CLAUDE.md acts as pointer file for AI context, not duplication of rules
